catalog_entry.summary: This is a Product User Manual for the Mediterranean Sea Biogeochemical Analysis and Forecasting Product, detailing its specifications, datasets, production system, processing information, file format, and nomenclature.

product_line.name: Mediterranean Sea Biogeochemical Analysis and Forecasting Product
